root_text.an5.149:1.1: “Pañcime, bhikkhave, dhammā samayavimuttassa bhikkhuno parihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an5.149:1.3: Kammārāmatā, bhassārāmatā, niddārāmatā, saṅgaṇikārāmatā, yathāvimuttaṁ cittaṁ na paccavekkhati.
root_text.an5.149:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhammā samayavimuttassa bhikkhuno parihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an5.149:2.1: Pañcime, bhikkhave, dhammā samayavimuttassa bhikkhuno aparihānāya saṁvattanti.
root_text.an5.149:2.3: Na kammārāmatā, na bhassārāmatā, na niddārāmatā, na saṅgaṇikārāmatā, yathāvimuttaṁ cittaṁ paccavekkhati.
root_text.an5.149:2.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhammā samayavimuttassa bhikkhuno aparihānāya saṁvattantī”ti.

translation_text.an5.149:1.1: “Mendicants, these five things lead to the decline of a mendicant who is temporarily free.
translation_text.an5.149:1.3: They relish work, talk, sleep, and company. And they don’t review the extent of their mind’s freedom.
translation_text.an5.149:1.4: These five things lead to the decline of a mendicant who is temporarily free.
translation_text.an5.149:2.1: These five things don’t lead to the decline of a mendicant who is temporarily free.
translation_text.an5.149:2.3: They don’t relish work, talk, sleep, and company. And they review the extent of their mind’s freedom.
translation_text.an5.149:2.4: These five things don’t lead to the decline of a mendicant who is temporarily free.”
